summary: FE-1: Shell + Routing — Vite/React/TS/Tailwind scaffold, layout, routes, placeholder pages
M1: Analysis Pipeline (Layer 1A Tier 1) — section segmentation, 8-bar snapping, EDM labeler, RGB waveform, storage
M0: Beat-Link Bridge (Layer 0) — WebSocket client, adapter, fallback, manager, Java JAR, 121 tests
M2: Live Cursor + Pioneer Enrichment (Layer 1B) — TrackCursor, enrichment, divergence, PlaybackTracker
M0B: USB Scanner + rbox metadata — usb_scanner, pioneer_metadata, ANLZ beatgrid reading
FE-3: Track Table — TanStack Table, search filtering, mood/source badges
FE-4: Upload & Analyze Flow — batch analyze, progress tracking, folder browser
FE-BLT: Bridge Page — BridgeStatusPanel, HardwareSelectionPanel, disconnect/reconnect handling
FE-2: Console — WebSocket + Console + Bridge Status (architect review PASS)
Audit backlog (2026-03-17) — 5 audit items resolved, 304 tests passing
BUG-BRIDGE-CYCLE: 6 root causes fixed for crash-restart on hardware disconnect/reconnect
Research: 11 findings completed — waveform sources, DLP track ID reliability, ANLZ formats, hardware topology, audio capture, fingerprinting, bridge data strategy, beat-link DLP bug trace

FE-Analysis-Viewer: Pioneer-style colored waveform with section overlays, section list, zoom/scroll, bidirectional interaction, metadata panels, page assembly — all 8 tasks complete, typecheck + build pass

FE-Live-Deck-Monitor: 2-deck stacked layout, auto-scrolling waveform cursor, composite key track resolution, playback_position_ms derivation from beatgrid, DeckPanel/DeckMetadata/SectionIndicator/DeckEmptyState — all 7 tasks complete, 193 tests pass, typecheck + build clean
Fix composite key threading: tracking.py now uses track_source_player/slot for lookup (was defaulting to '1'), added resolve endpoint, 4 new tests, 0 regressions

Pioneer waveform reading: UsbTrack reads PWV5/PWV3/PWV7 from ANLZ .EXT/.2EX files, stores as base64 in pioneer_metadata, serves decoded via GET /api/tracks/{fp}/pioneer-waveform. 17 new tests, 374 total pass, 0 regressions.

MEDIUM: Dual-database USB scanning — read both export.pdb (DeviceSQL) and exportLibrary.db (DLP) from USB to handle mixed hardware setups. Build O(N) file-path mapping between ID namespaces at scan time.
MEDIUM: Add DeckAnalysisState enum (available/pending/analyzing/unavailable) to TrackCursor for on-demand analysis fallback. Enables Live Deck Monitor to show appropriate loading states.
MEDIUM: Stale-scan detection — compare rbox metadata against stored analysis to detect USB re-exports where DLP IDs have been reassigned.
M3: Cue Stream (Layer 2) — section cues (section_change, anticipation, progress, energy_level). Spec complete. Blockers resolved (fe-analysis-viewer + fe-live-deck-monitor complete).
DEFERRED to M7: Custom constellation-map fingerprint generation (~500-800 lines, 2-3 dev-days). Standard hashing first; tempo-invariant later. No suitable library exists.

DEFERRED: Layer 0.5 audio capture prototype — USB interface + sounddevice for mixing ratio detection via informed source separation. Feasible (~0.5ms per update) but not needed until multi-deck Phase 2.
FE-2 remaining: Console panel wired to real-time bridge log output (currently placeholder)
FE-2-ADVISORY-1: Missing 'Reconnecting... (attempt N)' system entry during WS reconnection
FE-2-ADVISORY-2: Chevron direction differs from spec (cosmetic)
FE-2-ADVISORY-4: No tests for consoleStore ring buffer or consoleMapper diff detection
FE-BLT-FOLLOWUP-1: Faster interface detection polling (5s vs 30s) during waiting_for_hardware
FE-BLT-FOLLOWUP-2: Beat-link discovery cycle optimization
FE-BLT-FOLLOWUP-3: Interface-aware waiting_for_hardware messaging (requires contract change)
FE-BLT-QA-GAP-1: Mock tool / fixture data for DeviceInfo/PlayerInfo shapes for recovery testing

Bridge Finder Upgrade: beat-link 8.1.0-SNAPSHOT, all 6 Finders enabled, 5 new message types (track_metadata, beat_grid, waveform_detail, phrase_analysis, cue_points), ADR-017, bridge v2.0.0, 163 tests pass
ADR-015 composite key threading: 2 commits on fix/ADR-015-composite-pk-threading (ea1baac fix + 4a37189 resolve endpoint), 12/12 tracking tests pass, 3/3 resolve tests pass, ready for validator
